source_old_req: The Demo.impl implementation must ensure that the abstract interfaces Mix_1 and Mix_2 are correctly refined to the concrete implementations Buzzer.impl and Light.impl, respectively. The Port_1 event input to Mix_1 shall be properly redirected to the Buzzer.impl device, and the Port_2 event input to Mix_2 shall be properly redirected to the Light.impl device. These refinements must maintain the timing and state legality of the external stimulus events received through Port_1 and Port_2, as inherited from the Mixin architecture. Additionally, the Demo.impl must verify that the hybrid events originating from the abstract nodes are correctly decoupled and fully processed by their respective physical devices at the lower implementation layers.
natural_requirement: The Mixin component shall define the implementation-level signal routing for Mixin.impl. In the implementation layer, Mixin.impl shall route signal flow from Port_1 to Mix_1.Port_1 through Y1 and signal flow from Port_2 to Mix_2.Port_2 through Y2.

requirement_items.text: The Mixin.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from Port_1 to Mix_1.Port_1 through connection Y1.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Mixin.impl implementation shall declare connection Y1 from Port_1 to Mix_1.Port_1.

requirement_items.text: The Mixin.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from Port_2 to Mix_2.Port_2 through connection Y2.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The Mixin.impl implementation shall declare connection Y2 from Port_2 to Mix_2.Port_2.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The Mixin.impl implementation shall declare connection Y1 from Port_1 to Mix_1.Port_1. The Mixin.impl implementation shall declare connection Y2 from Port_2 to Mix_2.Port_2.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The Mixin.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from Port_1 to Mix_1.Port_1 through connection Y1. The Mixin.impl implementation shall route the signal flow from Port_2 to Mix_2.Port_2 through connection Y2.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
